bonuses.leadin: The title lovelorn sculptor dies after falling off of a cliff in Switzerland in this author’s early novel Roderick Hudson. For 10 points each:
bonuses.leadin_sanitized: The title lovelorn sculptor dies after falling off of a cliff in Switzerland in this author's early novel Roderick Hudson. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this prolific author who in his New York Edition added prefaces to novels like The Portrait of a Lady.

Roderick dies lovelorn after this woman marries an Italian prince. In a later James novel titled for her new title, she meets Hyacinth Robinson, who kills himself instead of carrying out an assassination.

Another recurring character first introduced in Roderick Hudson is the sculptor Gloriani, who in this later James novel, owns a garden in Paris where Lambert Strether tells Little Bilham to “live all you can.”
parts_sanitized: Name this prolific author who in his New York Edition added prefaces to novels like The Portrait of a Lady.

Roderick dies lovelorn after this woman marries an Italian prince. In a later James novel titled for her new title, she meets Hyacinth Robinson, who kills himself instead of carrying out an assassination.

Another recurring character first introduced in Roderick Hudson is the sculptor Gloriani, who in this later James novel, owns a garden in Paris where Lambert Strether tells Little Bilham to "live all you can."
answers: Christina Light [or The Princess Casamassima; accept any underlined portion]
answers_sanitized: Christina Light [or The Princess Casamassima; accept any underlined portion]
